name: Water Mist Fire Extinguisher — 6 Litre
shortDescription: De-ionised water mist — safe around electrical equipment and people.
longDescription: Water mist units discharge a fine de-ionised, AFFF-additive spray that cools the fire and blocks radiant heat without conducting electricity. They are increasingly specified for offices, hospitals, schools and kitchens where a non-toxic, residue-free agent is preferred. This Kanex unit is effective across Class A, B, C, F (kitchen) and electrically started fires, with a CE-marked brass chrome-plated valve, internally plastic-coated and externally UV-resistant polyester-coated cylinder, and helium leak detection tested to 1×10⁻⁸ mbar·l/sec.

images.alt: Water Mist Fire Extinguisher — 6 Litre supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Fire class
specs.value: A, B, C, F and electrical

specs.label: Extinguishing media
specs.value: De-ionised water mist with AFFF additive
